title: malcolmia graeca subsp. graeca
intro: Malcolmia graeca subsp. graeca, also known as Greek cress or Mediterranean cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant to aid in cough relief. Malcolmia graeca subsp. graeca can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to support the body's natural healing processes.
